overview: DantaNova is an AI-powered dental health platform for early detection of dental issues and instant emergency dentist connection. Users scan their teeth via camera, get AI-powered analysis on a 3D dental arch visualization, and can book emergency dentists. Features a unique Dental Passport trust-transfer system for dental care while traveling.
features: Emergency Dentist Finder and booking system
Real-time messaging between patients and dentists
Y Combinator pitch page with PDF export
